AA2 · Intelligence Arrival Sequence

Intelligence 01
The Concierge
Always Present · Your Team Lead
Without
Navigating everything alone. No memory. No continuity.
With
A personal intelligence who knows you, your goals, your world.
Intelligence 02
The Chef
Food · Recipes · Grown Folks Pairings
Without
Generic recipes. Wrong pairings. Nutrition with no context.
With
Every meal aligned to your biology, your goals, your life.
HRV
Scanner
Nutrition
Biosignal
Stress
Sleep
Mood
Intelligence 03
Bio Buddy
Nervous System · HRV · Speaks When It Matters
Without
Body signals go unread. Patterns invisible. Thresholds unknown.
With
Speaks only when asked or a threshold is crossed.
Intelligence 04
The Chauffeur
ON GRID · OFF GRID · Complete Briefings
Without
Maps with no memory. Routes with no context.
With
Pre-programmed safe routes. Full briefings at every waypoint.
Intelligence 05 · Last Out
The Equalizer
Safety · Immune System · Silent Guardian
Without
Harm enters quietly. Labels lie. No one watching the gate.
With
Nothing passes without clearance. Speaks only in emergencies.
